calendar.matters:
FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar May-19-2026 Continued To Jul-21-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Jul-01-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Jessica Jones appeared via zoom for Leo Bautista (trustee).
Kristina Lam appeared via zoom for Mauricio Carias (conservatee).

Discussion was held regarding the cleaning services, That the brother and the caretaker will be moving out at the end of the month, they all plan on splitting the cleaning bill, and that Vanessa Carias still has not paid back the $750.39.

The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Jun-11-2025 Continued To Jun-25-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
Off Calendar May-14-2025 Continued To Jun-11-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Jessica Jones, for Leo Bautista, Trustee.
No other appearances.

At the court's query, counsel offers an update re the following: status of the petition regarding approval of caregiver fees; caregiving services that were provided by Conservator when the cleaning service came to the apartment; re whether the Conservator is able to provide adequate caregiving services in light of her injury; re the TrueLink purchases that were inadequately described. Counsel advises that she can file a supplement if the court wishes her to do so. The court agrees with counsel's suggestion.

The subject matter is continued to Jun-11-2025 at 9:00 am in Department 204. Counsel is requested to file the supplement prior to the next calling. A Status Hearing on the Filing of a Petition for Approval of Caregiver Fees shall be set for the same date in the related Conservatorship matter.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Thompson. Not Reported.
